title: gastridium lendigerum var. muticum
intro: Gastridium lendigerum var. muticum, also known as muticose Gastridium, is a type of grass or herb that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Gastridium lendigerum var. muticum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Gastridium lendigerum var. muticum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been used in traditional remedies to promote overall well-being.
